creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
Created attachment 143719
djvulibre-3.5.25.3_2.patch

Log:
 * add stage support
 * correct use of LIB_DEPENDS
 * add missing OPTIONS_DEFINE=DOCS
 * use :MDOCS instead of :MDOC
 * correct handling of man pages 
 * fix portlint issue in pkg-descr
 * use ${STRIP_CMD} (there is no 'install-strip' install target)
